name: Taramosalata, 1 (Tarama Sauce, 1)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Best olive oil (more if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tarama in a blender or food processor.
2. Wet the bread and thoroughly squeeze out any excess water; add it to the tarama.
3. Add a little oil, then blend until well combined.
4. Add the onions and continue blending.
5. Slowly pour additional oil into the mixture while continuously blending to achieve a smooth, creamy paste.
6. Gradually add lemon juice according to taste.
7. Adjust the consistency and flavor by adding more bread or lemon juice as desired.
8. Serve in a bowl with crackers, crusty bread, onion slices, etc., for pairing.
9. Garnish with parsley and olives for an elegant platter.
10. Taramosalata is typically served at the beginning of a meal and can be enjoyed throughout.
